subcodes.first_line: O My Afnán! Verily thy Lord, the Most Glorious, calleth thee unto the Supreme Horizon and maketh mention of thee with that whose fragrance shall never cease to endure [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا افنانی ان ربک الابهی یدعوک الی الافق الاعلی و یذکرک بما لاینقطع عرفه بدوام
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
